title: GateResult
description: Result returned by CallGate.execute(). Immutable. permitted=false means the tool body never ran.

permitted.description: True iff the capability gate approved the action AND the tool executed successfully.

output.description: Tool output. Only present when permitted=true. Type depends on the tool.

denied_reason.description: Human-readable denial reason. Present and non-null when permitted=false.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool that was invoked.
